caption: The video features Basil Chapman, the creator of "The Guardian Wave Trading Method," during an episode of "The Tiger Technicians Hour" on June 8th, 2022. The scene is set with a split-screen format; on the left, Basil is seen speaking, likely discussing market analysis or trading strategies. On the right, there is a graphic titled "The Opening Call" with a smartphone displaying stock market data, including indices like the Dow Jones and individual stocks such as AAPL, SBUX, NKE, and YHOO. The background includes a cup, possibly containing coffee, adding to the professional yet casual atmosphere of the discussion. The overall setting suggests an informative session aimed at traders and investors interested in market insights and techniques.
